notes: Name regex (`^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,64}$`) and the 1024-char description cap are confirmed. tools.maxCount=128 is the documented soft recommendation (verify against your account/model). Default mode: pattern/format/min*/max* are accepted but NOT enforced by the model. strict:true requires additionalProperties:false on every object and ALL properties listed in required (express optionals as a null union, e.g. type:["string","null"]); it caps nesting at 5 levels and ~100 total object properties.
